en: She's going to need some sort of lawyer. You know, Jay, Mitchell is so burnt out right now.
ko: J. 미첼은 지금 너무 지쳐 있어요.

en: He is in desperate need of a break. Bench warrants are a no-brainer. And I mean, come on.
Does Gloria really look like the kind of woman who would run a brothel?
Yeah, I better go with her. You should go. Yeah. Mm-hmm. Don't be nervous, all right?
ko: 네, 그녀와 함께 가는 게 좋겠어요.

en: I'll explain your situation. We'll have you out of here in no time. 30 days in county jail.

ko: 다음은 아니타 멘차카, 경범죄 절도입니다. 보세요?

en: See? Mister, you're a lawyer. Help me, please. Oh, I'm sorry.
I'm her lawyer. I will help her so this will go faster.
ko: 제가 그녀를 도와서 이 일이 빨리 진행되도록 할게요.

en: She reminds me of my abuela with her headscarf and her petty theft charges.
Here, Your Honor. I'm Mitchell Pritchett, attorney to Miss Menchaca.
Menchaca. How are you? Are you ready to enter a plea? Absolutely.
I see no reason why this matter should take up any more of the court's valuable time.
ko: 이 사건이 법원의 소중한 시간을 더 이상 빼앗아서는 안 된다고 생각합니다.

en: I'm not guilty, Your Honor. Why? Gonna need a minute.
